## Description
Provide a clear description of the change, the problem it solves, and the context behind the solution.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change resolving an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature requiring API / schema update)
- [ ] Code refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification and Testing
### Local Verification
- [ ] Build compiles successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Linter passes without warnings/errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Formatting is clean (`npm run format:check`)
- [ ] All unit tests pass with coverage (`npm run test`)

### Manual Testing
Please detail how the changes were verified in the browser extension environment:
1. Load unpacked extension from `dist/`
2. Steps to reproduce and verify behavior...

## Screenshots / Code Diffs (if applicable)
Add visual evidence showing the impact of the UI/UX changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows style and naming guidelines of this repository
- [ ] No sensitive credentials, tokens, or API keys are committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility is preserved
- [ ] Related issues are linked below

## Related Issues
Closes #
